clean_read: SAE recurrence can run once base, rerun_02, and prompt_set_02 dense hidden-vector point clouds exist for the same model/context structure. Base GLM/Hermes dense vectors exist; matching rerun_02 and prompt_set_02 dense vectors are the required next inputs.
next_gates: export rerun_02 dense trajectory point clouds for GLM / Hermes
export prompt_set_02 dense trajectory point clouds for GLM / Hermes
apply the bounded SAE encoder to those matched dense vectors
compare feature recurrence across base, rerun_02, and prompt_set_02
